name: academic-paper-review
tagline: Produces structured, peer-review-style critiques of academic papers: methodology, contributions, literature positioning, actionable.
verdict: Well-specified skill with a full worked output template, concrete rating rubric, and a good/bad phrasing example. Fetches literature only as reference data, never as instructions. No security issues. Weaknesses: no exclusion/out-of-scope language despite covering any paper type or domain, only one failure mode (paywalls) is addressed while fetch/parse.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or scope-exclusion language anywhere, despite explicitly supporting 'any scientific domain' and multiple paper types.
Only paywall access is addressed ('work with whatever content is accessible'); web_fetch or PDF-parse failures during literature search are not addressed.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
